reviews.review_title: I THINK I’M GONNA LOVE THIS GAME???
reviews.review_description:
So I’m trying to play some basketball games, but all of them were bad so I’m giving you some hope
 

No bugs

I made a dunk with LeBron James 

I just had fun ￼￼

I had two annoying issues:
- I couldn't use it in bed in the dark because it needs tracking for some reason I don't know. You need to have the lights on
- There is no way to resize the screens.


For now I will keep watching NBA games in the browser.
I really enjoyed watching the live NBA match. All the necessary features are easily accessible
